# ToolsPilot.work — Free Online Utilities

> ToolsPilot is a collection of 159+ privacy-first, browser-based web tools. No sign-up, no tracking, 100% free.

## Key Features

- No sign-up or login required.
- 100% free to use — no hidden paywalls.
- Local processing — data never leaves the user's browser for client-side tools.
- Files auto-deleted within 24 hours for server-processed tools.
- Dark-mode-first, responsive UI.

## Core Tool Categories

### Document Tools
- PDF Editor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/document/pdf-editor
- PDF Merger: https://toolspilot.work/tools/pdf/merge
- PDF Splitter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/pdf/split
- PDF Compressor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/pdf/compress
- PDF to Word: https://toolspilot.work/tools/document/pdf-to-word
- Word to PDF: https://toolspilot.work/tools/document/word-to-pdf
- PDF to Excel: https://toolspilot.work/tools/document/pdf-to-excel
- Online Word Editor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/document/word-editor
- E-Signature: https://toolspilot.work/tools/pdf/esignature

### Spreadsheet Tools
- Online Excel Editor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/spreadsheet/excel-editor
- Excel to CSV: https://toolspilot.work/tools/spreadsheet/excel-to-csv
- CSV to Excel: https://toolspilot.work/tools/spreadsheet/csv-to-excel
- CSV Viewer & Editor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/spreadsheet/csv-viewer
- Pivot Table Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/spreadsheet/pivot-table
- JSON Flattener: https://toolspilot.work/tools/spreadsheet/json-flattener

### Image Tools
- Image Converter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/image/convert
- Image Compressor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/image/compress
- Image Resizer: https://toolspilot.work/tools/image/resize
- Background Remover: https://toolspilot.work/tools/image/background-remove
- Photo Editor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/image/photo-editor
- HEIC to JPG: https://toolspilot.work/tools/image/heic-to-jpg

### Developer Tools
- JSON / YAML / XML Formatter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/json-yaml-xml
- JWT Decoder: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/jwt-decoder
- Regex Tester: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/regex-tester
- Cron Parser: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/cron-parser
- Diff Checker: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/diff-checker
- SQL Formatter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/sql-formatter
- API Request Builder: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/api-builder
- Timestamp Converter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/timestamp-converter
- Base64 File Encoder: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/base64-file
- Chmod Calculator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/developer/chmod-calculator

### Text & Writing Tools
- Text Utilities (case, count, hash, diff): https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/utilities
- Grammar Checker: https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/grammar-checker
- Paraphrasing Tool: https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/paraphraser
- Text Summarizer: https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/summarizer
- OCR — Image to Text: https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/ocr
- Markdown Editor: https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/markdown-editor
- Writing Templates: https://toolspilot.work/tools/text/writing-templates

### Security & Privacy Tools
- Password Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/security/password-generator
- Hash Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/security/hash-generator
- File Encryption (AES-256): https://toolspilot.work/tools/security/file-encryption
- UUID Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/security/uuid-generator
- TOTP Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/security/totp-generator
- Breach Checker: https://toolspilot.work/tools/security/breach-checker

### Finance & Trading Tools
- Compound Interest Calculator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/finance/compound-interest
- Options Profit Calculator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/finance/options-calculator
- Currency Converter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/finance/currency-converter
- SIP Calculator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/finance/sip-calculator
- Tax Calculator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/finance/tax-calculator
- Retirement Calculator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/finance/retirement-calculator

### SEO Tools
- SEO Analyzer: https://toolspilot.work/tools/seo/seo-analyzer
- Meta Tag Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/seo/meta-tag-generator
- Sitemap Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/seo/sitemap-generator
- Page Speed Insights: https://toolspilot.work/tools/seo/page-speed

### Utility Tools
- QR Code Generator: https://toolspilot.work/tools/utility/qr-barcode
- Unit & Currency Converter: https://toolspilot.work/tools/utility/unit-converter
- World Clock: https://toolspilot.work/tools/utility/world-clock

## API Access

ToolsPilot provides a public API for programmatic access to server-side tools.

- Base URL: https://toolspilot.work/api
- Tool catalog: GET https://toolspilot.work/api/tools
- No authentication required. Rate limited to 100 requests per 15 minutes.
- Files auto-deleted within 24 hours.

## Blog

https://toolspilot.work/blog
